properties.sql: SELECT id, c_alerted_at AS alerted_at, c_envelope_code AS envelope_code, COALESCE(c_programme, '—') AS programme, COALESCE(c_util_pct, '—') || '%' AS util_pct_disp, to_char(CAST(NULLIF(c_allocated,'') AS NUMERIC(15,2)), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS allocated_disp, to_char(CAST(NULLIF(c_used,'') AS NUMERIC(15,2)), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS used_disp, CASE WHEN c_severity = 'WATCH' THEN 'WATCH ≥80%' WHEN c_severity = 'OVER' THEN 'OVER ≥100%' WHEN c_severity = 'AUTO_FREEZE' THEN 'AUTO-FROZEN ≥110%' ELSE c_severity END AS severity_html, CASE WHEN COALESCE(c_acknowledged_at,'') = '' THEN 'pending' ELSE 'ack by ' || COALESCE(c_acknowledged_by, '?') END AS ack_status FROM app_fd_budget_threshold_alert ORDER BY CASE WHEN COALESCE(c_acknowledged_at,'') = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, datecreated DESC
